reasoning: Based on FRED data showing a clear downward trend from 1.84% (Nov 2024) to 1.64% (Nov 2025) in 12-month CD rates. Statistical trend analysis gives P(value > 1.64) = 0.41. Recent Fed rate cuts in 2025 (including October) support continued downward pressure, though Fed Chair Powell signaled uncertainty about December cuts. For Dec 9 2025 (short horizon), probability is 0.38 - below the statistical estimate due to strong downward momentum (rates fell from 1.68% to 1.64% in recent month). For Feb 7 2026 (longer horizon), probability is 0.42 - closer to 0.50 reflecting increased uncertainty, but still below 50% given the established downward trend and accommodative Fed policy direction.
